title: eragrostis lurida subsp. contracta
intro: Eragrostis lurida subsp. contracta, also known as Blue Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and as an expectorant to relieve coughs. The health benefits of Eragrostis lurida subsp. contracta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
